Class JavaCodeParameterRenderer

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param.ObjectToStringParameterRenderer
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render.JavaCodeParameterRenderer
All Implemented Interfaces:
ParameterRenderer<Object>
public class JavaCodeParameterRenderer extends ObjectToStringParameterRenderer
A specialized parameter renderer that evaluates the correct context classpath for dynamic Java execution snippets and injects it into the NetBeans viewer.
Author:
anahata

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class ObjectToStringParameterRenderer

    agiPanel

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JavaCodeParameterRenderer()
    sets the language to 'java' and 'editable' to true.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected StringHandle
    createHandle(String content, AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, String paramName)
    Overrides the handle factory to inject the correct context classpath for dynamic Java execution snippets so the high-fidelity NetBeans viewer can provide accurate semantic highlighting.

  • Method Details

    • createHandle

      protected StringHandle createHandle(String content, AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, String paramName)
      Overrides the handle factory to inject the correct context classpath for dynamic Java execution snippets so the high-fidelity NetBeans viewer can provide accurate semantic highlighting.
      Overrides:
      createHandle in class ObjectToStringParameterRenderer
      Parameters:
      content - The string content.
      call - The tool call.
      paramName - The parameter name.
      Returns:
      The configured StringHandle.
